codeReview.summary: The round-2 fix does address the two round-1 findings at the point they were identified: `OffscreenBridge` now persists partial-text/tool-start mutations (`packages/chrome-extension/src/offscreen-bridge.ts:77-103,178-190`), and `updateBridgeTabStatus()` is now a tab-state-only mutator (`packages/webapp/src/scoops/orchestrator.ts:342-347`), so the duplicate status-broadcast path is gone. But the user-visible mid-run selection flow is still incomplete: when a scoop is selected after a turn has already started, the UI hydrates only from `SessionStore` and does not reconnect `OffscreenClient.currentMessageId` to that persisted in-progress turn. As a result, post-click `tool_end` / `response_done` for a pre-click turn can be dropped entirely, and post-click `text_delta` starts a second assistant message instead of continuing the loaded one. That leaves VAL-SPAWN-016's "subsequent events render live after selection" behavior still unsatisfied for the exact path this fix is meant to cover.

issues.description: Mid-turn selection still lacks live-turn reconciliation. `selectScoop()` only hydrates `session-${folder}` from `SessionStore` (`packages/webapp/src/ui/main.ts:391-394`), and `ChatPanel.switchToContext()` loads those persisted messages as ordinary non-streaming history (`packages/webapp/src/ui/chat-panel.ts:175-180`). `OffscreenClient.handleAgentEvent()` does not seed `currentMessageId` from that persisted in-progress assistant turn; it only creates one when a post-selection `text_delta` or `tool_start` arrives (`packages/webapp/src/ui/offscreen-client.ts:317-335`). If the next live event after selection is `tool_end` or `response_done`, the handler drops it because `currentMessageId` is still missing (`packages/webapp/src/ui/offscreen-client.ts:344-363`). If the next live event is `text_delta`, it opens a second assistant message instead of continuing the already-loaded one. So the new `persistScoop()` calls fix empty-state hydration, but they do not fully restore the "click a running scoop and keep seeing the same turn continue live" behavior required by VAL-SPAWN-016.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The regression coverage still stops at persistence and selected-from-start relay behavior; there is no test that selects a scoop after pre-click partial/tool-start state has already been persisted and then verifies that post-click `text_delta` / `tool_end` / `response_done` continue the same turn. That gap let the remaining selection-time reconciliation bug slip through.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `packages/chrome-extension/tests/offscreen-bridge.test.ts:340-424` only asserts `SessionStore.saveMessages` on pre-click partials/tool-starts; `packages/webapp/tests/ui/offscreen-client.test.ts:356-383` covers `tool_start`/`tool_end` only when the scoop is already selected before any events; the handoff's interactive checks drive callback stubs via `agent-browser eval` rather than the actual `selectScoop()` path.

summary: Fail. The fix correctly adds mid-stream persistence and removes the duplicate status broadcast, but selecting a scoop after its turn has already started still does not reconnect live events to the persisted in-progress message. Post-click `tool_end` / `response_done` can still be lost, and post-click text can split into a second assistant message.
